title: veronica rotunda var. subintegra
intro: Veronica rotunda var. subintegra, also known as the round-leaved Veronica, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Veronica rotunda var. subintegra include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, with some sources also suggesting its use as a topical cream or ointment for skin conditions.
